name: fpf-memory
description: Bun-first compiler-backed FPF spec runtime exposed through hosted Vercel and local MCP surfaces with a Hono server engine.

scripts.evaluate:work: bun src/cli.ts evaluate-work --target current-pr --base origin/main --format markdown
scripts.vercel:website:build: bun run docs:build && bun run build:vercel-website
scripts.vercel:website:deploy: bun run vercel:website:build && bun scripts/deploy-vercel-prebuilt.ts --project fpf-sh --config vercel.json
scripts.vercel:website:deploy:prod: bun run deploy:validate && bun run vercel:website:build && bun scripts/deploy-vercel-prebuilt.ts --project fpf-sh --config vercel.json --prod
scripts.vercel:mcp:build: bun run predeploy && bun run build:vercel-mcp && bun run bench:vercel:function-size
scripts.vercel:mcp:deploy: bun run vercel:mcp:build && bun scripts/deploy-vercel-prebuilt.ts --project fpf-reference-mcp --config vercel.mcp.json
scripts.vercel:mcp:deploy:prod: bun run deploy:validate && bun run vercel:mcp:build && bun scripts/deploy-vercel-prebuilt.ts --project fpf-reference-mcp --config vercel.mcp.json --prod
scripts.build: bun run build:runtime && bun run build:mcp
scripts.build:mcp: bun build ./src/entrypoints/mcp-stdio.ts --outfile dist/stdio.js --target node --format esm && bun scripts/fixup-stdio-build.ts
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:generate && RSPRESS_PERSISTENT_CACHE=false rspress build
scripts.test:ci: rstest run --shard=1/4 && rstest run --shard=2/4 && rstest run --shard=3/4 && rstest run --shard=4/4
scripts.deploy:validate: bun run validate:published && bun run monitor:content -- --mode local --format markdown --fail-on-breach
